name: Math Seeker
short_description: Push the boxes and solve the math puzzles! Here, you will enjoy the charm of math seamlessly woven into the gameplay. A variety of boxes and mechanisms infused with mathematical elements await your discovery. Unleash your wit, unravel the game's secrets, and claim the crown of math!
detailed_description:
"Math Seeker" is a puzzle game of pushing boxes which integrates mathematical elements. The core gameplay revolves around arranging boxes to form the desired mathematical expressions and then pushing those boxes for evaluation. Of course, some levels have unique and ingenious ways to win.


The game is divided into five chapters, featuring nearly a hundred levels. It gradually introduces new boxes and mechanisms, following a mathematical thread that leads from arithmetic to geometry and functions.


The game supports an editing function, allowing players to create levels and share them with others through Steam Workshop.
